name: Enable Shopify Pre-Orders
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Related:"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Understanding-Shopify-Pre-Orders", "children": [{"text": "Understanding Pre-Orders"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This feature will be available to all Shopify Connector customers by the "}, {"text": "30th of March 2022.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Shopify Settings"}], "data-id": "shopify-settings"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powtXEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powtXEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage (73).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When enabling Pre-Orders for your store, you will need to select from one of the following options to define the number of products available for Pre-Order, and the impact on Purchase Orders."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Details", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Disabled"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stock will not be available for Pre-Order"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accept Pre-Orders for On Order Stock"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products on selected Purchase Orders will be included in the stock available for Pre-Order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When a new Pre-Order is received, a Special Order will be created and linked to an existing Purchase Order."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Accept Pre-Orders"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A new Special Order Purchase Order will be created each time a Pre-Order product is sold"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Inventory levels disregarded - customers can order as many as you want"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-a6c64e08"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Only one option can be selected at the Shopify Integration option (i.e. you cannot have some products set up using Sell On-Order Stock and other products set up with Create new Special Orders."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you select to sell the On-Order stock option, the quantity available to sell online is calculated using the On-Order quantity."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Available to Pre-Order"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On-Order quantity + Available Quantity"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-a8cadb22"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To enable Pre-Orders:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Integrations > Shopify", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Pencil ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon to edit the store"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pre-Orders can be enabled independently for each store"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select a "}, {"text": "Pre-Orders ", "bold": true}, {"text": "option"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powtcEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "children": [{"text": "Enabling Products"}], "data-id": "enabling-products"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once Pre-Orders have been enabled a new \"Pre-Order Products tab\" will be displayed within the Shopify settings."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Pre-Order Products ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tab"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powthEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powthEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage (75).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "PLU Scan ", "bold": true}, {"text": "field and either scan or type the product code (products will populate in a list below as you type them in). Codes available to be used: Product ID, Supplier SKU, Supplier SKU 2, and Manufacturer SKU."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powtmEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powtmEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage (76).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products must be already published to Shopify to be available for Pre-Orders"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Style Code ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to add all sizes and colours of that style"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Product/s will be added to the table at the bottom of the page"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powtrEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powtrEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage (77).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A synchronisation will be triggered to update the product on Shopify to add a \"PREORDER\" tag"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powtwEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powtwEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage (78).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For more information on how Retail Express manages Pre-Order tags please refer to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Understanding-Shopify-Pre-Orders", "children": [{"text": "Understanding Shopify Pre-Orders"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If the Shopify configuration is set to \"Accept Pre-Orders\" no additional changes are required for the product to be available for Pre-Order (Retail Express will synchronise and enable the \"Allow Overselling\" flag on Shopify so the product/variants is available for purchase immediately)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If the Shopify configuration is set to \"Accept Pre-Orders for On Order stock\" the product/variant will also need to be on an "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Understanding-Shopify-Pre-Orders", "children": [{"text": "eligible Purchase Order"}]}, {"text": " to be available for Pre-Order online"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To remove products from Pre-Orders tick the box on the left"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powu1EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powu1EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage (79).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Remove Products", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reminder: If Pre-Orders are configured to \"Accept Pre-Orders for On Order stock\" the product will need to be on an eligible Purchase Order to be available for Pre-Order online", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Enabling Purchase Orders"}], "data-id": "enabling-purchase-orders"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have configured Pre-Orders to \"Accept Pre-Orders for On-Order Stock\" you will need to enable your Purchase Orders to make the products eligible for pre-order."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Purchase Order must be "}, {"text": "assigned to an Inventory Location Outlet", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Purchase Order must be "}, {"text": "marked as On-Order", "bold": true}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\tIncomplete or Back Order Purchase Orders are not eligible for Pre-Orders"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Purchase Order must have been "}, {"text": "marked as Available for Pre-Order", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To update the Purchase Order as Available for Pre-Order:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Purchase-Order-PO-Manager", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Order Manager"}]}, {"text": " to locate the Purchase Order to be updated (or complete the steps below when creating the Purchase Order)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the "}, {"text": "PO Details", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab tick the option \"Available for Pre-Order\""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powu6EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000powu6EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage (80).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Continue to update/create the remainder of the Purchase Order as required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": " or place the Purchase Order On Order (if creating the order)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Now you're all set to begin promoting and selling your Pre-Order products. Click here for information on how to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Processing-Shopify-Pre-Orders", "children": [{"text": "process Pre-Order sales"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Frequently Asked Questions"}], "data-id": "frequently-asked-questions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#eta-calculation", "children": [{"text": "How is my ETA calculated?"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The ETA calculation looks at a few different factors, such as:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Your current Available stock"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Orders that are marked as On-Order and set to \"Available for Preorder\" (and the Priority of those Purchase Orders)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have sufficient available stock to fill the order, the ETA displayed will be today's date. If a product does not have available stock and would be sourced from a Purchase Order, the returned ETA date will be the ETA stored against the Purchase Order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have several Purchase Orders that meet the above criteria, we will prioritise Purchase Orders by their ETA date (the PO with the earliest ETA date will be chosen)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the qualifying Purchase Orders do not have ETA dates or have matching ETA dates, we will prioritise the Purchase Orders based on Outlet Priority."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#eta-today", "children": [{"text": "Why does my ETA button show today's date?"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This can occur if you have available stock in Retail Express, but have applied an "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Shopify-Inventory-Buffers", "children": [{"text": "Inventory Buffer"}]}, {"text": " to your Shopify Synchronisation."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Buffers will deduct from your global inventory and reduce the Inventory synchronised with Shopify. Once the inventory falls below 0 and all Pre-Order conditions are fulfilled, the product will be available for Pre-Order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#eta-unknown", "children": [{"text": "Why is my ETA set to Unknown / Contact Store for Availability?"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This occurs when we cannot retrieve a valid ETA date from Retail Express."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reasons for this could be that you have forgotten to enter an ETA date against the Purchase Order, or the ETA date against the Purchase Order is in the past."}]}]
